name: omatic-server-connection
description: O-Matic Server connection — the MCP plugin that connects OpenAI Codex to an O-Matic Server and ships Probot (orchestrator), Fred (storage + connection CRUD), and Data (analyst + DBA) skills. Connects to the factory brain; does not bundle a database.

interface.shortDescription: Connect Codex to an O-Matic factory brain.
interface.longDescription: The O-Matic Server MCP connection layer for OpenAI Codex. It resolves a project-bound factory, reports startup and connector health, searches factory memory, manages task and decision records, and exposes guarded SQL against the connected PostgreSQL + pgvector factory brain. The database itself is the separate o-matic-server image — this plugin connects to it, it does not bundle it.
